title: 小弟而家apply 緊Royal Australian Navy  (你問我答）

replies.msg:
Q: 軍隊體能要求係咪好高？
A: 喺澳洲每個兵種都有唔同嘅要求

E.g.
navy:
15 push up, 20 sit up, 6.1 beep test
Swimming test: 3m jump from platform, 50m swim (可以用浮條), 10m swim (full uniform), 15mins 踩水

Army：
15 push up, 45 sit up, 7.5 beep test

Airforce:
10 push up, 20 sit up, 6.5 beep test

詳情可見： https://www.defencejobs.gov.au/joining/can-i-join/health-and-fitness



Q: 外國人可唔可以加入
A: 視乎情況，主要都係citizen + 特定PR

特定PR: 已經係PR, 而且已經有apply 緊Citizenship

https://www.defencejobs.gov.au/joining/can-i-join/citizenship#

Q: Bootcamp 情況如何？
A: 每一個軍種都有佢哋獨立嘅boot camp 亦都有分開咗 軍官同埋普通士兵training

E.g. Navy
軍官： 20 星期喺HMAS Creswell + 職業訓練 （2-3年）
士兵： 11 星期喺HMAS Cerberus + 職業訓練 （0.5-2 年）



Q: 背景審查
A: 所有又唔係喺澳洲出世或者係其他地方住過超過6個月都要填一份文件。 你需要提供過去10年嘅住址證明，工作證明，讀書證明，都需要有四個人嘅人格擔保 （2 x professional, 2 x social)


Q: 人工
A: 人工普遍都算高.
例如： 廚師$79,661 AUD 一年
Hospitality $79,661 AUD

Officer: $101,000AUD 起跳

所有公司都係根據軍階擬定， （Medic 同Lawyer 分開）

Link: http://content.defencejobs.gov.au/pdf/triservice/DFT_Document_PayRates.pdf

已經好多
不分男女係咪的

quote.msg:
已經好多
不分男女係咪的

加油，有朋友(local鬼仔) 報左兩次Army officer都唔收，第三次如果都fail好似就無得再報。原因話佢果時太細(岩岩中學畢業去報) 唔適合做officer住。第二次係2年後去報又係類似說話reject左application. 佢依家讀緊TAFE, 畢業後會去試最第一次，唔得就專心做carpenter (tafe course graduate).

replies.msg:
You just need to be fit with average intelligence. The rest is about whether the OSB likes you or not.

You are applying for the army/navy, not Goldman Sachs

quote.msg:
面試完咗啦
整體我都覺得出咗九成功力.......
冇計唯有出年走去讀大學

You just need to be fit with average intelligence. The rest is about whether the OSB likes you or not.

You are applying for the army/navy, not Goldman Sachs

You just need to be fit with average intelligence. The rest is about whether the OSB likes you or not.

You are applying for the army/navy, not Goldman Sachs

replies.msg:
I was a cadet and went to a cadet school. Attended the Army OSB for a commission in the reserve. I’ve also worked with the department of defence as a scientist.

I didn’t start the commission course because I was finishing my PhD at uni and got a full time job.

The OSB isn’t hard. It’s even easier for Navy and the Air Force as they don’t test your fitness during the selection. And the written and oral tests are easy as long as you speak/write “good” english, by Army standard.

And also, they don’t like people who are too smart, for obvious reasons.

replies.msg: It may vary with the officer post accordingly. The officer salary that I’ve posted is based on the job preference that I’ve applied for, which is the Mairtime Warfare Officer.
